ground_truth.title: NYPL's Best Books of 2025 | The New York Public Library
ground_truth.main_content: The New York Public Library is proud to present our Best Books of 2025. Our annual recommendations of the best books for adults, kids, and teens—curated by our expert staff and librarians—encompass fiction, nonfiction, graphic novels, poetry, kids' books in Spanish, and much more. All of these books are in the Library's catalog and many are available in multiple formats, including e-books, audiobooks, and accessible editions. Through December 31, the Library is making a selection of 26 e-book titles available to NYPL cardholders with no wait times. Audiobooks are also available for select titles. Free book giveaways are available at Bronx Library Center, Stavros Niarchos Foundation Library (SNFL), and St. George Library Center. The page features lists for Best Books for Adults, Best Books for Teens, Best Books for Kids, and Los mejores libros para pequeños. Downloadable PDF lists are available for each category. Accessible formats including digital talking books, braille, and Bookshare editions are available for select titles. Author events featuring creators of this year's Best Books are scheduled including Lili Taylor, Kayla E., Neil Sharpson, Dr. Haleh Massey, and Ben Passmore.
with: The New York Public Library is proud to present our Best Books of 2025.
Our annual recommendations encompass fiction, nonfiction, graphic novels, poetry, kids' books in Spanish, and much more.
Through December 31, the Library is making a selection of 26 e-book titles available to NYPL cardholders with no wait times!
Every year the librarians and staff on our Best Books committees read thousands of titles to select noteworthy new books for readers of all ages.
Find out which of our Best Books are currently available in digital talking book, braille, and Bookshare editions.
